title: The Road Narrows
description: On pages 24–25, this part focuses on the road narrows, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: The Road Narrows. Vivi and the Straw Hats decide that stopping the war means confronting Crocodile directly instead of chasing the rebels blindly. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: The Rebellion's goal: To crush the Royalist Army at the capital.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: The Royal Guard's goal: To crush Crocedile at Rainbase.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Luffy and the Straw-Eat crew also aim to defeat Crocodile at Rainbase.

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: Remaining Time before Baroque Works's Operation Utopia: 17 hours.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Q:...This is wasting enough space as it is already so can I just stop at three?

summary: This part develops the road narrows and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
